channel.title: Technology - Latest - Google News
channel.copyright: Copyright © 2026 Google. All rights reserved. This XML feed is made available solely for the purpose of rendering Google News results within a personal feed reader for personal, non-commercial use. Any other use of the feed is expressly prohibited. By accessing this feed or using these results in any manner whatsoever, you agree to be bound by the foregoing restrictions.

item.description:
1. Ubuntu CVE-2026-3888 Bug Lets Attackers Gain Root via systemd Cleanup Timing Exploit  The Hacker News
  2. CVE-2026-3888: Important Snap Flaw Enables Local Privilege Escalation to Root  Qualys
  3. New Ubuntu Flaw Enables Local Attackers to Gain Root Access  Infosecurity Magazine
  4. Ubuntu Desktop Systems Vulnerability Enables Attackers to Gain Full Root Access  CyberSecurityNews
  5. Qualys Threat Research Unit Discovers Critical Vulnerability in Ubuntu Operating System  CXO Digitalpulse

item.title: Google Photos is getting another redesign that makes it faster and easier to edit photos - Android Police
item.description:
1. Google Photos is getting another redesign that makes it faster and easier to edit photos  Android Police
  2. Google Photos for Android Fixes UI Regression in Editing Tools  jetstream.blog
  3. Google Might Reverse the Controversial Photos App Editor Redesign  Android Headlines
  4. Google Photos app tweaks, Gemini's Personal Intelligence now free, fix for annoying Wi-Fi problem, and more  PiunikaWeb
  5. Google Tests Reversal Of Photos Editor Redesign  findarticles.com

item.title: iOS 26.4 upgrades one of my most-used Control Center features in a big way - 9to5Mac
item.description:
1. iOS 26.4 upgrades one of my most-used Control Center features in a big way  9to5Mac
  2. Trombone emoji designed by Maryland students headed to iPhones everywhere  WTOP
  3. Apple releases iOS 26.4 RC for iPhone with upcoming features  9to5Mac
  4. 8 new emojis are coming to Apple products with iOS 26.4. Take a look.  USA Today
  5. RC builds of iOS 26.4, macOS 26.4 arrive as release draws near  AppleInsider
